current.summary: The soul's evolutionary direction (Pisces NNode) is at near-exact trine to natal Jupiter in Scorpio's creative 5th house. The path and the work are the same thing right now.
current.reading:
The soul's evolutionary direction (NNode in Pisces) is in sustained trine to the natal creative well (Jupiter in Scorpio 5th): this is a multi-year window where the soul path and the work built from genuine depth are in direct alignment — not effort, but confirmation of direction.

Natal Jupiter in Scorpio 5th is the creative teacher, the place of full-weight engagement, where the business and the readings live. A trine between the NNode and this point is a current of ease — the soul path runs through the creative work, not around it or toward it. The NNode in Pisces adds a layer: the path has an oceanic, surrender-to-depth quality. Not forcing the business to succeed but trusting the deep creative nature to generate what it naturally does.

current.summary: Jupiter's expansion is creating minor friction with natal Mars in the 6th house of daily work and craft. The drive to do more may be slightly ahead of what the structure can hold.
current.reading: Jupiter in Cancer is squeezing against the sesquiquadrate angle to natal Mars in Sagittarius (6th house). This is a minor friction aspect — not a challenge, but a small recalibration signal. The 6th house Mars wants to push forward in the work; Jupiter's expansive current is slightly misaligned with that directional drive. The friction point is where the two speeds need to sync.

current.summary: The current transiting NNode in Pisces is square to natal NNode in Sagittarius, creating a brief cross-pressure between the current collective evolutionary direction and Jordan's natal soul path.
current.reading: The transiting NNode in Pisces squaring natal NNode in Sagittarius (6th house) is a brief nodal cross. The current sky's evolutionary direction (Pisces: surrender, vision, depth) is at right angles to the natal 6th house soul path (Sagittarius: expansion, teaching, daily work as identity). This isn't a conflict so much as a recalibration of speed — the natal path is Sagittarian forward motion; the current sky is asking for Piscean receptivity.

current.summary: Jupiter in Cancer trined natal Pluto in Scorpio's 6th house at peak contact June 9. The scope and depth of the work were structurally confirmed. Now separating.
current.reading:
The warmest, most generous sky of the year was flowing directly into the most privately held, most intensely felt part of your chart. Jupiter in Cancer — the sign of nurture, emotional care, genuine connection — reached trine to natal Pluto in Scorpio (6th house) at exact contact June 9. The 6th house is where you show up in the body: the daily practice, the form the work takes. Pluto there doesn't do anything partially.

At its peak, Jupiter's trine to natal Pluto offered one thing: structural confirmation that the scale of what's being built belongs exactly where you've put it. Not encouragement. Actual acknowledgment of scope. The window is now past its sharpest point (0.22° separating), but the current it opened — Jupiter and Venus in Cancer trining the entire Scorpio 5th house stellium — continues through mid-July.

current.summary: Chiron at 29° Aries sextile natal Ascendant at 29° Gemini — two anaretic (threshold) degrees in dialogue. First exact June 7; now 0.25° separating. The wound completing its Aries chapter has opened a cooperative channel to how you present yourself.
current.reading:
Your Ascendant at 29°22' Gemini is anaretic — at the threshold degree, the 29th, the degree that carries the full weight of a sign's learning right before the crossing into something new. Your Ascendant is not just a Gemini rising; it's Gemini at its most concentrated, most completing, most ready to transmit.

Transiting Chiron at 29° Aries reached exact sextile to this Ascendant on approximately June 7, 2026. Two anaretic degrees in sextile is unusual — both planets simultaneously at threshold, in cooperative aspect. The wound completing its Aries chapter (courage, initiation, the warrior's relationship to vulnerability) making an opening to the threshold of how you're seen.

The sextile is a cooperative aspect. It doesn't force or demand — it creates an opening that can be used intentionally. What Chiron is offering to the Ascendant is the Aries wound's gift: the knowledge that showing up as exactly who you are — even in the places where that's been wound-generating — is the only move that works at the threshold. Gemini rising adapts, mirrors, reflects. The Chiron sextile is asking what becomes possible when that adaptation moves toward authenticity rather than away from it.

current.summary: Uranus in Gemini is pressing an inconjunct adjustment signal to natal Jupiter in Scorpio's 5th house. The creative work won't expand in the expected direction — the lateral turn is the information, not an obstacle.
current.reading:
Uranus in Gemini is moving into an inconjunct with natal Jupiter in Scorpio (5th house). The inconjunct is not a challenge or support — it's an adjustment signal. The 5th house creative work (the business, the readings, what requires full imaginative engagement) is receiving a Gemini-style redirection: Gemini's multiplicity is asking the Scorpio depth to shift its form rather than its content.

The practical implication: something in how the work is structured, presented, or distributed needs to adjust. Not the depth — the delivery. The direction the work wants to move toward won't be the expected one. Watch where the creative work wants to pivot sideways rather than straight ahead; that's the information. Exact June 14.

current.summary: Pluto in Aquarius is sextiling natal Moon in Aries (10th house), slowly converting the emotional intelligence into structural authority. The retrograde exact pass arrives late June — simultaneous with Neptune conjunct Moon's first peak.
current.reading:
Your Moon at 4°58' Aries sits in the 10th house — the house of career, public identity, and how you're perceived in the world. It's the organ where emotional life and professional life share the same blood. When things land in your career, they land in your body.

Pluto in Aquarius is making an offer to the Moon. The offer is: the emotional intelligence you carry, the thing you can feel in rooms and conversations before anyone speaks — that can become structural authority. Not softness that earns a seat at the table. Authority that is simply the accurate read, made visible.

This transit is particularly live because Neptune is simultaneously conjuncting this same Moon, stripping the usual filtering layer between perception and impact. Neptune opens the field; Pluto gives the field a spine. What Neptune makes porous, Pluto makes structural. The second exact pass (retrograde) arrives approximately June 28–July 1 — simultaneous with Neptune's first exact peak. The most concentrated period of 10th house Moon activation in years.

current.summary: Jupiter in Cancer is adjusting its relationship to the Lot of Fortune in Aquarius (9th house). The expansion Jupiter wants to generate meets an angle requiring recalibration at the belief and worldview level.
current.reading: Jupiter in Cancer at an inconjunct to the Lot of Fortune in Aquarius (9th house) is a minor adjustment signal. The 9th house fortune placement involves worldview, teaching, and the structures of belief. Jupiter's Cancer warmth and the Aquarian analytical cool of the Fortune point are at right angles — the expansion available right now needs a slight shift in the conceptual framework to land fully.

current.summary: Neptune has been in sesquiquadrate friction with natal Venus in Scorpio's 5th house. Past its exact point in May; separating. The distinction between genuine desire and Neptunian idealization has been actively tested.
current.reading: Neptune in Aries forming a sesquiquadrate to natal Venus in Scorpio (5th house) is a friction-adjustment aspect — not the full dissolution of a conjunction, but a consistent pressure on the way desire and beauty are perceived. The Scorpio 5th house Venus holds deep, total romantic and creative values. Neptune's sesquiquadrate creates interference: what looks beautiful may be partially projection; what feels like connection may be partially vision. Past its exact point in May and separating, the fog-and-desire test is now in its closing phase.

current.summary: Uranus in Gemini is opposing natal NNode in Sagittarius (6th house) and simultaneously conjuncting natal SNode in Gemini (12th house). The operational soul path is being Uranus-disrupted; the old adaptation pattern (SNode) is being lit up from the same degree.
current.reading:
Uranus in Gemini is simultaneously opposing natal NNode in Sagittarius (6th house) and conjuncting natal SNode in Gemini (12th house). This is one of the more structurally significant transit patterns active right now. The NNode in Sagittarius (6th house) is the soul's growth direction — expansion through daily practice, teaching, the identity built through craft and work. Uranus opposing this is not blocking the direction; it's disrupting the form it was going to take.

Meanwhile, Uranus conjuncting the SNode in Gemini (12th house) is activating the old adaptation pattern — the Gemini flexibility, the multiplicity, the ability to mirror and shift. This pattern was the South Node default, the way Jordan moved through the world before the soul path was clearly named. Uranus lighting it up from the 12th house is pulling the unconscious layer to the surface.

Exact June 17. The operational form of the soul path is being renovated in real time.

current.summary: Uranus conjuncting natal SNode in Gemini (12th house) — the old adaptation pattern is being disrupted at the root. Part of the same axis as Uranus opposing NNode.
current.reading: The Uranus conjunction to natal SNode in Gemini (12th house) is the South Node axis of the Uranus-NNode opposition. Uranus at the SNode is disrupting the Gemini 12th house pattern — the adaptive, flexible, mirroring instinct that was the default before the soul path was consciously engaged. What ran below awareness (12th house) is now receiving a Uranus shock. Part of the same exact window as Uranus opposite NNode, June 17.

current.summary: Saturn in Aries (11th house) is in adjustment signal to natal Mercury in Scorpio (5th house). The community and tech work is asking the deep creative voice to tighten its form. Past exact and separating.
current.reading:
Saturn transiting Aries (11th house) forms an inconjunct to natal Mercury in Scorpio (5th house). The inconjunct is an adjustment aspect — not opposition, not support. Saturn from the community and technology house is sending a structural signal to the Scorpio 5th house voice: the depth is right, the form needs editing. The Scorpio Mercury's natural move is to go deep and wide; Saturn's ask is to go deep and focused.

Past exact and separating. The adjustment window is closing. What got tighter in the writing or communication during this period was the transit working correctly.

current.summary: Neptune is conjuncting natal Moon in Aries (10th house), dissolving the boundary between emotional life and professional identity. First exact pass arrives late June/early July — the most acute point of a 3-pass, year-long transit.
current.reading:
Your Moon at 4°58' Aries sits in the 10th house — the house of public identity, career, how you're perceived in the world. For most people, the Moon's emotional life runs beneath the professional surface. For you, those layers are the same layer. Career recognition is emotionally personal. When work goes well, you feel well. When the professional environment is uncertain, it hits the nervous system directly.

Neptune is the planet of dissolution, porosity, transcendence, and vision. Its conjunction to the Moon is not an event — it's a season that lasts years. What it does to the Moon is a permeability upgrade. The usual filtering between what you sense emotionally and what you act on gets thinner. The room you walk into — you feel the mood before anyone speaks. The project that's going well — you sense it before the data confirms.

Because this is your 10th house Moon, Neptune is thinning the wall between your emotional experience and your professional identity. The career is becoming more personally felt, and the personal is becoming more professionally visible. Creative vision flows more easily. But protection is also thinner — a slight, a moment of being unseen, lands harder than it would otherwise. First exact peak arrives late June/early July 2026. The most concentrated period of this transit approaches.

current.summary: Uranus in Gemini opposes natal Sun in Sagittarius (6th house). The first exact pass was May 14. Now separating; second pass (retrograde) arrives October 2026. The form of the daily work identity is being renovated.
current.reading:
The casing built for older rooms is being renovated. The Sun isn't changing — the container it's been presented in is.

Your Sun at 1°49' Sagittarius sits in the 6th house alongside Mars and the North Node — the house of daily work, craft, health routines, and the operational details of how you actually function. The Sagittarius stellium here means your daily work IS an expression of your core identity and soul path. What you do every day is what you're becoming.

Uranus is now in Gemini — the sign directly opposite your Sagittarius stellium — and in opposition with your Sun. Oppositions create awareness through contrast: Uranus in Gemini (information, adaptability, multiplicity, mirroring) pressing against your Sun in Sagittarius (authenticity, direction, embodied knowing, the single true north). The first exact pass was May 14. The retrograde second pass arrives October 2026. The work identity is between its first disruption and its deeper renovation.

current.summary: The transiting NNode in Pisces is forming a square to natal Sun in Sagittarius (6th house). A friction point between the current evolutionary pull (Pisces: surrender, vision) and the daily work identity (Sagittarius: teaching, expansion). Exact June 15–17.
current.reading:
The transiting NNode in Pisces forms a square to natal Sun in Sagittarius (6th house) — approaching exact June 15–17. A square is a friction aspect. The soul's current evolutionary direction (Pisces NNode: surrender, depth, dissolution of old ego-structures) is at right angles to the core daily-work identity (Sagittarius Sun 6th: teaching, seeking, expansion through daily practice).

This isn't a crisis. It's a necessary tension. The soul path is asking for something the operational identity hasn't fully made room for yet. The Sagittarian Sun in the 6th wants to push forward; the Pisces NNode wants receptivity. The square says: not this way, or not this fast. Brief transit — the NNode moves on within weeks. But the friction it's pointing at is real information.

current.summary: Neptune in Aries formed a trine to natal NNode in Sagittarius (6th house). Past exact; separating. The visionary and porous quality of Neptune has been flowing toward the soul direction, softening the Sagittarian push-and-seek instinct.
current.reading: Neptune in Aries formed a trine to natal North Node in Sagittarius (6th house) — past exact and now separating. The trine between these was a cooperative flow: Neptune's visionary, porous quality loosening the grip of old 6th house duty-patterns, making room for the path to feel like something that flows rather than pushes. The Sagittarius NNode in the 6th ordinarily needs to feel the daily work expanding, teaching, seeking. Neptune trining it from Aries said: trust what arrives before you see the full picture. The window is closing; what it opened can be carried forward.

current.summary: Neptune sextile natal SNode in Gemini (12th house) — the other end of the same trine/sextile axis as Neptune △ NNode. Old Gemini 12th house adaptation patterns are being gently dissolved.
current.reading: Neptune in Aries sextile natal SNode in Gemini (12th house) — the sextile end of the same axis as Neptune trine NNode. The Gemini 12th house holds the old adaptive patterns: the unconscious flexibility, the mirroring, the shape-shifting that served as the default before the soul path was consciously engaged. Neptune's sextile here is a gentle offer to release what those patterns no longer need to carry. Separating and closing.

current.summary: Neptune is in inconjunct adjustment to natal Jupiter in Scorpio (5th house). The visionary/porous quality of Neptune and the depth-expansion of Jupiter are at an adjustment angle — the creative work's scope needs to account for what Neptune is dissolving.
current.reading: Neptune in Aries forming an inconjunct to natal Jupiter in Scorpio (5th house) is a subtle adjustment signal. Jupiter in the Scorpio 5th wants to expand the creative work through depth and total engagement. Neptune's inconjunct from Aries is asking that expansion to remain flexible — what looks like the container for the work may need to shift as Neptune's vision clarifies. Separating; the acute pressure of this adjustment is past.

current.summary: Chiron at 29° Aries is forming an inconjunct to natal Sun in Sagittarius (6th house). The wound-healer is approaching an adjustment signal with the core daily-work identity.
current.reading: Chiron at 29° Aries forming an inconjunct to natal Sun in Sagittarius (6th house) is an adjustment signal between the wound-healer and the core work identity. The 6th house Sun in Sagittarius is the identity expressed through daily craft and purpose. Chiron's inconjunct from the anaretic Aries degree is asking whether the work identity is carrying any of Chiron's themes — the wound around being seen, the healer who can't accept their own healing. Still applying; exact in approximately 47 days at Chiron's current velocity.

current.summary: Pluto in Aquarius sextiles natal NNode in Sagittarius (6th house). Depth is being woven into the soul path — the transformative capacity is becoming part of the directional identity.
current.reading: Pluto in Aquarius forming a sextile to natal NNode in Sagittarius (6th house) is a cooperative transit. Pluto's offer here: the depth and transformative precision that has been building (especially through the Pluto sextile Moon axis) is now available to the soul path itself. The 6th house NNode's daily-work direction can draw on Plutonian depth as a resource, not just as pressure. Applying; building toward exact over the coming weeks.

current.summary: Saturn in Aries trines natal Mars in Sagittarius (6th house). Past its exact point; separating. Saturn's structural discipline has been cooperating with the natal drive to do and build. A steady, useful transit.
current.reading: Saturn in Aries forming a trine to natal Mars in Sagittarius (6th house) is a cooperative aspect between discipline and drive. The 6th house Mars in Sagittarius is the engine behind daily work — the motivated, directional, expansive push. Saturn's trine from Aries has been lending structure to that drive: not blocking it, but giving it form. Past exact and separating. The period of this trine's sharpest support is behind you.

current.summary: Uranus in Gemini is sextiling natal Moon in Aries (10th house). A cooperative disruption — the emotional/career intelligence is receiving a Uranian upgrade through the sextile angle.
current.reading: Uranus in Gemini forming a sextile to natal Moon in Aries (10th house) is a cooperative aspect. Where Neptune is dissolving the Moon's filters and Pluto is building the Moon's authority, Uranus is introducing innovation at the same 10th house axis. The sextile is not forced — it's an offer. The emotional and professional intelligence is being upgraded in real time by Uranus' Gemini-style rewiring: faster pattern recognition, more flexible responses, willingness to let the career direction shift in ways that wouldn't have been possible before. Building; applying.

current.summary: Pluto in Aquarius is squaring natal Jupiter in Scorpio (5th house). A slow-building pressure on the creative expansion and depth of the 5th house — Pluto asking whether the expansion is rooted in genuine power or in inherited assumptions about what growth looks like.
current.reading: Pluto in Aquarius forming a square to natal Jupiter in Scorpio (5th house) is a pressure aspect. The 5th house Jupiter in Scorpio holds the creative capacity and depth — the place of full engagement or nothing. Pluto's square from Aquarius is testing whether that capacity is expanding from genuine transformed power or from patterns that haven't been fully interrogated. Not a comfortable square; not a damaging one. The pressure is toward greater authenticity in the creative expansion. Applying; building over the coming weeks.

historical.summary: The grey sky. The inner critic made visible. The emotional field contracted into something exact, something accountable — and then the first pass complete, the solid ground underneath it real.
historical.reading:
Your Moon at 4°58' Aries sits in the 10th house of career, public identity, and professional visibility — where emotional life and career run on the same circuit. Saturn conjunct Moon in the 10th is the transit that asks: what is actually solid here? Not what you wish were solid, not what you perform as solid — what actually holds?

For Jordan specifically, this is Saturn landing on the Aries Moon's urgency and forward-motion need — the Moon that feels emotionally well when work is in motion and emotionally destabilized when it's not. Saturn at rest on the Moon is the stillness that Aries does not want. It is the teacher that forces the pause before the fire.

The 10th house context makes this professional and visible as well as personal. Career uncertainty lands harder. Being unseen registers more sharply. The inner critic loop runs more constantly. These are not signs of weakness — they are the architecture of this transit.

But Saturn's gift at completion is real: what was built during this transit is genuinely Jordan's and nothing can take it back. Every act of advocacy, every document filed, every boundary named — Saturn conjunct Moon makes it structural. The weight is the building material.

First pass complete April 12, 2026. The grey sky lifted. The advocacy work done under Saturn pressure — Tony documentation, the Associate Director title secured — became structural and is in the record. Second pass arrives approximately October 2026.
